title: Steak's Pvp Toggle
description: A PvP utility mod that improves visibility by tweaking shields, view bobbing, and FOV effects. More features and optimizations are coming in future updates.
body:
# PvP Toggle 

**PvP Toggle** is a lightweight, competitive utility mod designed for Minecraft players who value maximum visual clarity and focus during combat. This mod eliminates distracting animations, optimizes your HUD, and clears your screen—allowing you to stay 100% focused on the fight.

With a simple press of a button (default: `V`), you can instantly toggle all PvP optimizations on or off. Perfect for switching between casual building and intense combat!

## 🔥 Key Features

*   **One-Key Toggle:** Enable or disable all PvP features simultaneously with a single keybind (`V`), which can be customized in the standard Minecraft Controls menu.
*   **Enhanced Visibility (Fullbright):** Includes a built-in Gamma override. Boost brightness from the standard 100% up to 1500% for perfect vision in the darkest environments.
*   **Low Fire:** Lowers the fire height on your screen when burning, ensuring your crosshair and target are never blocked by flames.
*   **No Fog & Clear Water:** Completely removes distance fog and murky underwater fog, giving you infinite visibility across the battlefield.
*   **Compact View (Small Items):** Makes shields and off-hand items significantly smaller, drastically increasing your field of vision and reducing screen obstruction. Main hand scale can also be adjusted!
*   **Visual Cleanup:** Disables View Bobbing and FOV distortion effects (like sprinting and speed potions) to keep your screen steady during high-speed combat.
*   **No Hurt Cam:** Removes the annoying screen shake and camera tilt when taking damage. *(Disabled by default)*
*   **No Pumpkin Overlay:** Removes the dark UI mask when wearing a carved pumpkin on your head. *(Disabled by default)*

## ⚙️ Configuration
The mod comes with full **Mod Menu** and **Cloth Config** support! You can tweak every single feature mentioned above. If you only want "Low Fire" but want to keep "View Bobbing", you can easily configure it to fit your exact playstyle.

## 🚀 Performance Focused
PvP Toggle is written with minimalist, optimized mixins. It guarantees **zero impact** on your FPS or system stability. It is fully compatible with Sodium, Iris, and other performance mods.

## 📥 Versions
Available for Fabric:
*   **1.21.4**
*   **1.21.11**

---
*Stay focused. Win the fight.*
